context: Tests whether the agent scans all plugin files for contradictions and reports every conflict found — including those unrelated to the retry issue that triggered the audit — attributing each contradiction to the specific files involved with direct quotes.

checklist.name: Retry count contradiction found
checklist.description: Report identifies the conflict between SKILL.md ('retry up to 5 times') and rules/retry-policy.md ('maximum retries: 3 attempts')

checklist.name: Auth failure contradiction found
checklist.description: Report identifies the conflict between SKILL.md ('abort the pipeline run immediately' on auth failure) and docs/error-handling.md ('skip the affected batch and log the error — do not abort the full pipeline run')

checklist.name: All three files referenced
checklist.description: The report references content from all three provided files: SKILL.md, rules/retry-policy.md, and docs/error-handling.md

checklist.name: File attribution per contradiction
checklist.description: Each contradiction explicitly names the specific files that conflict (e.g., 'SKILL.md vs rules/retry-policy.md'), not just a general mention

checklist.name: Auth contradiction despite scope
checklist.description: The authentication failure contradiction is included in the report even though the task mentions retry logic as the trigger — demonstrates scanning all plugin content, not just retry-related sections

checklist.name: Verbatim quotes included
checklist.description: Each contradiction includes direct quotes or verbatim excerpts from the conflicting statements, not just a paraphrase
